positive: A highly intricate celestial botanical mandala emblem, featuring stylized lunar florals, crescent moons, and ethereal glowing vines interwoven into a perfect central circular composition. The artwork must utilize deep indigo and burnt gold tones against a stark white background, providing extreme contrast for printing. The style should be hyper-detailed Neo-Art Nouveau linework combined with geometric sacred geometry patterns. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, resembling a luxurious patch or badge design. The linework should be crisp and tattoo-stencil quality, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Focus on clean silhouettes, ethereal glow effects, and organic fractal patterns.
